body:
if you‚Äôve been following for a while you know i‚Äôve been on an extremely long hunt for the perfect sideboard. Well... @article totally blew me away with this one. I know, I know...I am such a snob about furniture quality which is why I typically look secondhand first (and believe me...I did!) but these pieces really, really blew me away in both quality and design and complement my vintage pieces so well. 

Mixing modern and new styles is what I‚Äôve found to be the best way to elevate my home to the place where it feels the most me. 

#vintagehomedecor #homedecor #secondhandhome #vintagestyle #midcenturyhome #modernvintage #homedecor

body:
if you‚Äôve been following for a while you know i‚Äôve been on an extremely long hunt for the perfect sideboard. Well... @article totally blew me away with this one. I know, I know...I am such a snob about furniture quality which is why I typically look secondhand first (and believe me...I did!) but these pieces really, really blew me away in both quality and design and complement my vintage pieces so well. 

Mixing modern and new styles is what I‚Äôve found to be the best way to elevate my home to the place where it feels the most me. 

#vintagehomedecor #homedecor #secondhandhome #vintagestyle #midcenturyhome #modernvintage #homedecor

The space is beautifully designed, showcasing the same quality and aesthetic the brand is known for online. The in-store experience, from browsing to delivery, was seamless, and the team at their Design Centre was FANTASTIC in bringing my ideas to life. body:
I had SO much fun exploring @article store at 848 E Hastings St, just minutes from downtown Vancouver. The space is beautifully designed, showcasing the same quality and aesthetic the brand is known for online. The in-store experience, from browsing to delivery, was seamless, and the team at their Design Centre was FANTASTIC in bringing my ideas to life. If you‚Äôre nearby or just visiting, it‚Äôs definitely worth a stop. Open daily 10am‚Äì6pm, with plenty of parking!
